User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user profile information and subscription status.

isElite.description: Whether the user has an active $1/month membership.

claimedProperties.description: List of parcel IDs claimed by the user.

PropertyClaim.title: Property Claim
PropertyClaim.description: Stores verification and claim details for a property.

parcelId.description: The unique parcel ID from the CSV.

ownerUid.description: The UID of the user who claimed the property.

verifiedAt.description: When the property was verified via OCR.

isPaid.description: Whether the $1/month payment has been completed.
